articles.title: Karnataka: Seven workers killed in rock collapse in Bengaluru - News On AIR
articles.full_text:
Seven migrant workers have lost their lives after a big chunk of rock slid and fell on them in the Bengaluru South taluk today. The tragedy struck at the Kaveri Crusher stone quarry in Madapatna village. While moving a massive rock at the top of the quarry, it slipped and fell downhill into the quarry pit where the labourers were working.
Those injured were evacuated from the accident site and are currently under medical treatment. The police have registered a case, and the hunt is on for the owners of the quarry. Those dead belonged to Bihar, Madhya Pradesh and north Karnataka.
The Deputy Chief Minister of Karnataka, Dr G Parameshwar, has expressed grief over the incident and said that suitable action will be initiated against the owners of the quarry who failed in safeguarding the safety of the workers under them.
Prime Minister Narendra Modi has extended condolences over the loss of lives due to the mishap. In a social media post, Mr Modi prayed for the speedy recovery of the injured.

articles.title: Ministry of Rural Development to review implementation of key schemes in Karnataka - News On AIR
articles.full_text: A team of senior officers from the Department of Rural Development in the Ministry of Rural Development is undertaking an official visit to Karnataka between the 5th and 11th of this month. The visit is aimed at holding review meetings with State Government officials and assessing the progress and implementation of key schemes. The team will also visit Belgavi and Davanagere districts to support the rollout of Viksit Bharat – Guarantee for Rozgar and Ajeevika Mission (Gramin), Viksit Bharat-RAG and review its implementation at the field level. The officers will assess the preparedness of district administrations, identify implementation challenges and facilitate timely resolution of issues to ensure effective rollout of the initiative. Further, the officers will review the implementation of other flagship programmes of the Ministry of Rural Development, including Pradhan Mantri Awaas Yojana-Gramin (PMAY-G), Deendayal Antyodaya Yojana-National Rural Livelihoods Mission (DAY-NRLM), Pradhan Mantri Gram Sadak Yojana (PMGSY), Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Scheme (MGNREGS) and the National Social Assistance Programme (NSAP).
